content: Self-Refine's iterative, unsupervised self-feedback loop for improving initial outputs can be structurally augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve the blind spot problem where a single self-feedback perspective cannot catch its own errors. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while boosting refinement accuracy beyond what single-perspective self-feedback can achieve.
